_note: Battle of Cangting (201) crushes Yuan Shao's army; Liu Bei flees to Liu Biao (201). Text explicitly cites 'first month of the eighth year of Rebuilt Tranquillity (AD 203)' for Cao Cao's renewed northern campaign.
Yuan Shao dies (May 202); succession war between Yuan Shang and Yuan Tan; Cao Cao takes Yejun (winter 204).
Cao Pi marries Lady Zhen (204); Cao Cao's expedition against the Wuhuan and pursuit of the last Yuans (207); death of Guo Jia (autumn 207).
Bronze Bird Tower foundations laid (208); Lady Cai overhears the secret; Liu Bei leaps the Tan Torrent (207).
Liu Bei meets the recluse Sima Hui at Nanzhang and recruits Shan Fu (Xu Shu); Cao Ren's first probe at Xinye. Late 207 / early 208.
Shan Fu's strategy captures Fancheng (Fankou); Xu Shu's mother trick lures him to Cao Cao, but he first recommends Zhuge Liang.
Sima Hui's second visit; Liu Bei's first two visits to Sleeping Dragon Ridge — across winter 207 into spring 208.
Third visit / Longzhong Plan (early 208); Sun Quan attacks Xiakou to avenge his father by hunting down Huang Zu.
Huang Zu killed at Xiakou; Liu Qi seeks counsel at Jiangxia; Zhuge Liang's first stratagem burns Xiahou Dun at Bowang Slope (autumn 208).
Liu Biao dies, Lady Cai surrenders Jingzhou; Zhuge Liang burns Xinye. Text explicitly dates Cao Cao's march as 'seventh moon of the thirteenth year of Rebuilt Tranquillity (AD 208)'.
